description_long: This is a classic wooden canoe with a pointed bow and stern, featuring a natural wood grain finish throughout its hull and interior. The canoe is equipped with two wooden bench seats and a central thwart for structural support. Two wooden oars with blue blades are positioned on either side, suggesting it is designed for manual rowing. The gunwales run along the top edge, providing reinforcement and a smooth handhold. The interior is open and spacious, allowing for seating and storage of small items. The overall craftsmanship and visible joinery highlight a traditional, hand-built aesthetic.
description: A traditional wooden canoe with two bench seats, a central thwart, and blue-bladed oars, finished in natural wood grain.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the canoe, both oars, and the wooden seats inside.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bow, both oars extended outward, and the arrangement of the seats.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the hull's curvature, oars, and interior seating.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the open interior, two bench seats, central thwart, and the placement of the oars.
